title: Carvana Expands Same Day Delivery Offering to Central Florida Residents
text: TAMPA, Fla.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Carvana (NYSE: CVNA), an industry pioneer for buying and selling used cars online, today announced its expansion of same day delivery to Central Florida Customers. Now Central Florida residents can receive their vehicle within hours of placing an order on Carvana.com. Select customers interested in selling their current vehicles to Carvana can also benefit from same day drop off at specific locations throughout the state. title: Amazon deal with Hydundai to disrupt online car selling market, Carvana and CarMax investors react
text: Amazon.com Inc (NASDAQ:AMZN) has greenlit car sellers to use the e-commerce site to directly sell to customers, launching via a partnership with Hyundai. The South Korean automaker will deliver a digital showroom on Amazon in 2024 through the new team-up.

title: Amazon to launch online vehicle sales in 2024, and CarMax, Carvana stocks dive
text: Amazon.com Inc. AMZN, -0.27% announced Thursday that it will launch online vehicles sales in the U.S., starting in 2024 with sales of Hyundai Motor Co. 005380, +1.26% vehicles. That sent shares of auto retailers CarMax Inc. KMX, -5.86% and Carvana Co. CVNA, -6.79% diving in afternoon trading.

title: Glancy Prongay & Murray LLP Announces Investigation of Carvana Co. (CVNA)
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Glancy Prongay & Murray LLP (“GPM”) announces its investigation of Carvana Co. (NYSE: CVNA) concerning the Company and its directors' and officers' possible violations of state laws. title: Carvana and NRG Debut Customized Mobile Content Studio Ahead of Inaugural Rocket League Combine on November 11-12

title: The Lonely Bull On The Planet: Carvana's Transformation Of The Marketplace Model (Rating Upgrade)
text: Carvana's stock price jumped 15% following its third quarter earnings release, driven by improved profitability and cost control. The company's wholesale marketplace unit saw strong double-digit growth, with wholesale unit sales growing 117% and gross profit expanding 311%. Taking cues from The RealReal, Carvana's shift to a B2B model promises higher margins and market expansion.
